SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 06

JUDGE:CHARLENE PADOVANI MICHELL;CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR: LESLIE GARBER 3:25PM: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PRESENT: PLAINTIFF HAMED SHAHAMIRI AND HIS COUNSEL BRENT M. KERNAN; DEFT. APPEARED AND REPRESENTED HIMSELF. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS READ ON RECORD BY THE COURT, AS FOLLOWS:DEFT TO VACATE THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 198 CARL STREET, #7, SAN FRANCISCO, CA; DEFT TO PAY PLAINTIFF THE AMOUNT OF $350 ON/BEFORE 5/9/95 NOON; PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT AND COST;EACH PARTY BEARS HIS OWN ATTORNEY'S FEE AND COST; PLAINTIFF IS TO HAVE IMMEDIATE JUDGMENT AGAIANST DEFT FOR THE PREMISES FOREMENTIONED, FOR $350 PROVIDED JUDGMENT STAYED TO 5/31/95. IN THE EVENT DEFT VACATES BY 5/31/95,5PM THEN WITHIN 10 DAY AFTER THAT DATE (JUNE 9,1995), PLFF WILL DISMISS ACTION AND HAVE JUDGMENT VACATED. KEY IS TO BE TURNED OVER BY DEFT TO THE OFFICE MANAGER, OR BE SLIPPED UNDER THE DOOR. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT AND SEND IT TO DEFENDANT FOR SIGNATURE (FOR HIS APPROVAL) AND THEN BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-08-1995 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
